note: Companion to cqr_lightgbm_quantile_v0.{md,json}. Records the contingency-tree decision WITHOUT auto-running any remedy step (reviewer directive: 'nao tentar Step 10+ dentro da Fase 4'). The Phase 4 KILL is OVER-coverage (global IC80 0.9219/0.9044/0.9274, all above 0.86), so the 1st research tree (ACI/AgACI/BC-ACI/k-cluster/EnCQR -- RESEARCH_CQR_IC80_RECOVERY_OPTIONS.md) is structurally the wrong shape: those steps can only WIDEN, and here we would need to NARROW. Step 8 (conform on the real-valued score, round at the very end -- the T-9-5 lesson) was ALREADY implemented in core/models/quantile_lgbm.py and did not rescue coverage.

observed_e_correction_per_fold_cp.comment: All conformal corrections were POSITIVE this run; the additive CQR step did NOT narrow the base band. The model DOES support a negative E (core/models/quantile_lgbm.py shrinks an over-covering nominal band), but on this data/feature-set E stayed positive.

contingency_tree.source_for_under_coverage: research/RESEARCH_CQR_IC80_RECOVERY_OPTIONS.md (1st research; ACI family; valid only for the sub-coverage case)
contingency_tree.source_for_over_coverage: research/RESEARCH_CQR_OVERCOVERAGE_AND_ALTERNATIVES.md (2nd research; the failure mode actually observed)

step_taken.label: Formal KILL
step_taken.rationale: Phase 4 stays KILL. Per reviewer + PLAN done-criteria, NO remedy step (1-9) was executed inside Phase 4. The recovery question (D1-D6 diagnostic, then QRF/NGBoost/DRF vs Phase 5+EMOS) is deferred to a separate preregistered task and is NOT part of this gate.

next_step_when_reopened.first: Run the D1-D6 diagnostic (research/RESEARCH_CQR_OVERCOVERAGE_AND_ALTERNATIVES.md, section 6) as a PREREGISTERED oracle/lower-bound diagnostic per fold/stratum -- NOT a trainable model-selection criterion.
next_step_when_reopened.then: If F3 (integer granularity) dominates: Phase 5 (Live NWP) + EMOS/MOS prereg, conditioned on member/spread availability. If F1/F2 (base quantile model) dominates: drop-in non-crossing QRF or NGBoost/CLOVER, under a new prereg. Conformal reweighting (arXiv:2303.12695) stays a transitional experiment, not the main path.
